query:
INSERT INTO orders (
  userId, orderNumber, status, paymentMethod, paymentStatus,
  subtotal, shippingFee, total,
  recipientName, recipientPhone, recipientEmail,
  shippingAddress, note, createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  120047,
  CONCAT('TEST-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-E2E'),
  'pending', 'credit_card', 'pending',
  '1.00', '0.00', '1.00',
  'LEO 測試', '0900000000', 'barmyhy1688@gmail.com',
  '台北市測試地址', '1元E2E測試訂單',
  NOW(), NOW()
);
